cmd: echo '=== n8n reach (no key, expect 401 if reachable) ==='; curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'api HTTP %{http_code}\n' -m 15 https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows; echo '=== .env files present ==='; for f in /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env /root/.env /root/.claude/.env; do [ -f "$f" ] && echo "FOUND $f"; done; echo '=== N8N key NAMES on VPS (names only, no values) ==='; grep -rhoE '^[A-Za-z0-9_]*N8N[A-Za-z0-9_]*=' /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env /root/.env /root/.claude/.env 2>/dev/null | sed 's/=.*/=/' | sort -u; echo '=== has any N8N key? ==='; if grep -rqsE 'N8N_API_KEY=.+' /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env /root/.env /root/.claude/.env 2>/dev/null; then echo YES_KEY_ON_VPS; k=$(grep -rhsE 'N8N_API_KEY=.+' /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env /root/.env /root/.claude/.env 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2-); echo -n 'api-with-key HTTP '; curl -s -o /tmp/wf.json -w '%{http_code}\n' -m 20 -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: $k" 'https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows?limit=100'; echo -n 'workflow count: '; grep -o '"name"' /tmp/wf.json | wc -l; else echo NO_KEY_ON_VPS; fi
